response.justification: Despite broad engineering experience, Maria lacks demonstrable production-scale leadership in agentic AI systems or fintech infrastructure, with no evidence of building multi-agent frameworks, real-time credit/risk systems, or scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — all core requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and systems
Experience contributing to AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in open-source infrastructure and event-driven systems (GISCollective)
concerns: No evidence of leading or scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people
Lacks demonstrable production experience in fintech, credit risk, or regulated AI systems
No mention of architecting multi-agent frameworks, observability pipelines, or model-agnostic AI infrastructure
